name: Kinito // KinitoPET
description:
Guys, I seriously made him into someone who is capable of dismembering and eating you. Do you want to fight him in NSFW? Expect insults to your address and good luck with the "Hunger Games":] 
By the way, art by mine. 
(Oops, it's still at the error checking stage. I don't speak English, so I apologize in advance for any mistakes, lol.)
